name: Blueberry Peach Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Duncan Hines blueberry muffin mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Rinse the blueberries and drain the peaches.
3. Pat the fruit dry with paper towels and spread it out in a single layer.
4. In a small bowl, mix together the sugar, flour, and cinnamon.
5. Add the softened butter to the mixture and cut it in until the ingredients are well combined.
6. Prepare the muffin batter according to the package instructions, but do not add the blueberries.
7. Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch square pan and spread it evenly.
8. Arrange the drained fruit on top of the batter.
9. Sprinkle the cinnamon mixture over the fruit.
10. Bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown.
